'''Giat Nor''' was the [[Capital/Legends|capital]] of [[N'zoth]], with a population of one million [[Yevetha]]. Outsiders were forbidden to enter, though some aliens were known to use disguise kits to gain entrance, despite the penalty of death if discovered.<ref name="CatCW">''[[Coruscant and the Core Worlds]]''</ref> The royal palace was located in Giat Nor, as well as a sophisticated monument to [[Nil Spaar]]. The palace, however, remained empty, with no viceroy or royal ruler, after the disappearance of Nil Spaar in [[17 ABY/Legends|17 ABY]], as many Yevethans continued to hold out hope that he would return. The city of [[Hariz]] was located 150 kilometers southeast of Giat Nor.
